File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer name as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show Global People s.r.l. as customer

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer name as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l as customer

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Exception for flights/hotels where Local Employer name not possible
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Worker's name acceptable when Local Employer name not possible, end client should not be mentioned

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer address as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show Via Venti Settembre 3, Torino (TO) CAP 10121, Italy

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer address as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show Via Uberto Visconti Di Modrone 38, 20122 Milano, Italia

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer VAT number as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show IT12455930011

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer VAT number as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show P.IVA 12205930964

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer tax code as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Must show 12455930011

File_Related_Requirements.Description: Local Employer tax code as customer on supplier invoice
File_Related_Requirements.Rule: Not specified in document
Same currency with clear exchange rate
Must be clearly stated on receipt
Must be actual tax receipts or invoices, not booking confirmations
Must be scanned (not photos), clear and readable
Must be traceable: bank transfers, postal transfers, credit/debit cards, prepaid cards, bank/cashier's checks
Type of car, petrol/electric/hybrid, model
Petrol, diesel, electric, hybrid
Starting point, arrival point, and total kilometers
Screenshot from tracking app (Google Maps) or similar
Scan of car passport (libretto di circolazione)
Any personal information not required for reimbursement must be removed
Submit separate report for each business trip
Cannot mix per diem method with actual expenses - must agree on one method per business trip

Compliance_Policies.Description: General business expenses for job completion
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: All approved expenses paid as NET to employee and grossed up
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide a proper tax invoice with VAT details

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free up to 75% of total amount, labeled as "spese di rappresentanza" if not tax-free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must also write down the name and company details of the client/supplier you entertained

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Grossed up if not tax-free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Grossed up if not tax-free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free up to 15 days, subject to tax beyond 15 days
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Non-taxable up to 15,000 km, excess subject to tax annually
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is not applicable - you must provide: 1) Scan of car registration document 2) Car details (make/model/fuel type) 3) Google Maps screenshot showing route and distance

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-exempt up to 20% of costs (rental cars only)
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: 100% tax-exempt with proper documentation
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide the actual ticket or transportation document (not just payment receipt)

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Excluded from per diem, reimbursed against receipts
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Fuel expenses are taxed
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: €46.48/day (no provisions), €30.99/day (meals OR hotel provided), €15.49/day (both provided)
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Hotel receipt alone is not enough - you must ALWAYS provide receipts for ALL trip expenses when per diem is used

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: 75% tax exemption on per diem rate
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for all expenses within your city area

Compliance_Policies.Description: Business trips with no overnight stay
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Per diem reduced by 1/3 for day trips
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for ALL trip expenses (meals, transportation)

Compliance_Policies.Description: Business trips with no overnight stay
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Standard per diem rates apply
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for ALL trip expenses (meals, transportation)

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: €77.46/day (no provisions), €51.65/day (meals OR hotel provided), €25.82/day (both provided)
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Hotel receipt alone is not enough - you must ALWAYS provide receipts for ALL trip expenses when per diem is used

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Allowance reduced by 10% for missions over 1 month
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Hotel receipt alone is not enough - you must ALWAYS provide receipts for ALL trip expenses when per diem is used

Compliance_Policies.Description: International trips with no overnight stay
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Per diem reduced by 1/3 for day trips
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for ALL trip expenses (meals, transportation)

Compliance_Policies.Description: International trips with no overnight stay
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Standard per diem rates apply
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide receipts for ALL trip expenses (meals, transportation)

Compliance_Policies.Description: Car rental during domestic business travel
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free up to 15 days, subject to tax beyond 15 days
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Description: Car rental during international business travel
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free up to 15 days, subject to tax beyond 15 days
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Description: International travel expenses not covered by per diem
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Not subject to any set maximum to be considered tax free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide supporting documents such as receipts

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-exempt up to 20% of costs (rental cars only, not assigned to specific employee)
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Transportation expenses rules do not apply to company cars
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Standard_Rule: Local Employer name must appear on invoices
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Flight tickets and hotel bookings where company name not possible
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Expense_Type: Transportation - Flight, Train, Car Rental, Bus, Accommodation - Hotel, Accommodation - Other
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's name on invoice WHEN company name cannot be used for personal travel bookings (flight tickets, hotels, and similar personal bookings per e.g. principle)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Standard_Rule: Local Employer address must appear on invoices
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Flight tickets and hotel bookings where company address not applicable
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Expense_Type: Transportation - Flight, Train, Car Rental, Bus, Accommodation - Hotel, Accommodation - Other
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's personal address on invoice WHEN worker books personal travel (logical extension of name exception)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Standard_Rule: Local Employer VAT number must appear on invoices
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Flight tickets and hotel bookings where company VAT not applicable
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept absence of company VAT number WHEN worker makes personal flight/hotel bookings (logical extension of name exception)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Standard_Rule: Choose either per diem OR actual expenses
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Expense_Type: Per Diem - Meals vs Meal Receipt - Actual
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reject mixed methods - IF per diem chosen THEN no actual meal receipts accepted for that specific trip (must agree on one method)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Do not require receipts BUT require scan of car registration document, car details (make/model/fuel type), and Google Maps screenshot showing route/distance

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Tax any mileage claims ABOVE 15,000 kilometers annually (non-taxable up to 15,000 km only)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Limit tax exemption to 75% of total amount AND require third party details (labeled as "spese di rappresentanza")

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Tax car rental costs AFTER 15 days (tax-free up to 15 days only)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Standard_Rule: Per diem available for all domestic travel
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Only allow domestic per diem WHEN travel is 60+ kilometers outside worker's municipal area

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Meals or hotel provided during domestic travel
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Apply tiered per diem rates - €46.48 (no provisions), €30.99 (meals OR hotel provided), €15.49 (both provided)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Limit tax exemption to 75% of per diem rate WHEN travel is within municipal area

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Meals or hotel provided during international travel
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Apply tiered per diem rates - €77.46 (no provisions), €51.65 (meals OR hotel provided), €25.82 (both provided)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reduce allowance by 10% AFTER missions exceed 1 month duration

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Business trips with no overnight stay under NCBA Commercio
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reduce per diem by 1/3 WHEN no overnight stay under NCBA Commercio agreements

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Require traceable payment methods only (bank transfers, postal transfers, credit/debit/prepaid cards, bank/cashier's checks) - non-traceable payments not deductible

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Exception_Condition: Fuel, parking, toll charges for rental cars
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Limit tax exemption to 20% of costs WHEN car is not assigned to specific employee (rental cars only)

Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Applicable_ICPs: Global People s.r.l., GoGlobal Consulting S.r.l
Italy_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excepti.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Require receipts submitted in same currency WITH clear exchange rate calculation
